auctions.title: 1967 Porsche 911S Coupe
auctions.story: Numbers-matching short-wheelbase 911S with Kardex copy, recent compression test, and records from long-term California ownership.
auctions.condition: Older glass-out repaint, restored Fuchs, correct Weber carburetors, clean underside, and minor patina on the original dash trim.

thread.text: Inspection report and underbody photos are attached to the gallery.
@petrolnotes cold-start video was added this morning.

auctions.title: 1958 Mercedes-Benz 190SL
auctions.story: Two-top roadster with documented refurbishment, tool roll, data card, and recent independent inspection.
auctions.condition: Excellent leather and brightwork, correct Solex carburetors, strong cold start, and a small paint chip noted on the left rocker.

thread.text: Inspection report and underbody photos are attached to the gallery.
@petrolnotes cold-start video was added this morning.

auctions.title: 1972 Datsun 240Z Series II
auctions.story: Dry-climate Z with rebuilt SU carburetors, refreshed suspension, service binder, and original color combination.
auctions.condition: Straight panels, driver-quality repaint, clean hatch area, rebuilt brake hydraulics, and small cracks in the console plastic.

thread.text: Inspection report and underbody photos are attached to the gallery.
@petrolnotes cold-start video was added this morning.

auctions.title: 1965 Ford Mustang Fastback
auctions.story: A-code fastback prepared for a seven-day auction window with Marti report, restoration photos, and dyno sheet.
auctions.condition: Fresh interior, strong paint depth readings, tidy engine bay, and pending cold-start video.

thread.text: Inspection report and underbody photos are attached to the gallery.
@petrolnotes cold-start video was added this morning.

auctions.title: 1988 BMW M3
auctions.story: Clean E30 M3 with ownership history back to 1997, recent valve adjustment, and unmodified bodywork.
auctions.condition: Sale completed after reserve was met. Buyer documents and carrier pickup are in progress.

thread.text: Inspection report and underbody photos are attached to the gallery.
